creator: ssedov@mbsd.msk.ru
text:
Plese, perform a repocopy of cad/gschem to cad/geda-gschem.
        for this project is actually belongs to gEDA suite.
        This project is not very usable without other geda programs, and
        geda-gschem describe it better, than gschem. Furthermore, other
        geda ports use geda- prefix contradictry to this port.
